top_signals.title: Crop Prices Hit 3-Year High as Black Sea Attacks, Heat Stoke Food Inflation
top_signals.summary: Crop prices rose to a three-year high as heat waves and escalating attacks in the Black Sea threatened to disrupt global grain trade, reviving risks to food inflation that have also been stoked by the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Global Refiners Are Cutting Out Oil Traders To Buy Venezuelan Crude Directly
top_signals.summary: Commodity traders are having the rug pulled out from under one of their biggest paydays yet as refiners start bypassing oil and traders and buying Venezuelan crude directly, according to Reuters. Refiners and major oil-producing firms are rapidly gaining market share in Venezuelan crude by locking in direct supply contracts with state-run Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A. (PDVSA), bypassing the global middlemen and commodity trading houses such as Trafigura and Vitol that previously dominated the space. Six months after traders reopened Venezuela’s…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Postcard from Italy: in the flower fields of Castelluccio
top_signals.summary: On the high plains of the Apennines, the summer ‘flowering’ is one of the country’s great seasonal spectacles — though barely known overseas
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: McCormick Will Add London Listing After Unilever Food Deal
top_signals.summary: McCormick & Co. has picked London as a secondary listing location, just months after striking a deal to combine with Unilever Plc’s food business and in a blow to Amsterdam’s hopes.

top_signals.title: Live reader Q&A — How will Burnham govern the UK?
top_signals.summary: Join a live Ask an Expert Q&A with the FT’s northern England correspondent Jennifer Williams, columnist and Inside Politics writer Stephen Bush and UK chief political commentator Robert Shrimsley, now

top_signals.title: Sport documentaries muddle grey area of storytelling vs reality
top_signals.summary: As every sport seemingly gets its own documentary, Matt Readman assesses whether they’re meddling with reality. There is a famous rule in nature documentary filmmaking: observe, but never intervene. The moment the camera changes the behaviour of its subject, it stops documenting reality and starts creating it. Earlier this month the International Cricket Council investigated [...]
